히브리서 10:1.content: For the law, having a shadow of the good to come, not the very image of the things, can never with the same sacrifices year by year, which they offer continually, make perfect those who draw near.

히브리서 10:2.content: Or else wouldn’t they have ceased to be offered, because the worshipers, having been once cleansed, would have had no more consciousness of sins?

히브리서 10:3.content: But in those sacrifices there is a yearly reminder of sins.

히브리서 10:4.content: For it is impossible that the blood of bulls and goats should take away sins.

히브리서 10:5.content: Therefore when he comes into the world, he says, “You didn’t desire sacrifice and offering, but you prepared a body for me.

히브리서 10:6.content: You had no pleasure in whole burnt offerings and sacrifices for sin.

히브리서 10:7.content: Then I said, ‘Behold, I have come (in the scroll of the book it is written of me) to do your will, O God.’ ”

히브리서 10:8.content: Previously saying, “Sacrifices and offerings and whole burnt offerings and sacrifices for sin you didn’t desire, neither had pleasure in them” (those which are offered according to the law),

히브리서 10:9.content: then he has said, “Behold, I have come to do your will.” He takes away the first, that he may establish the second,

히브리서 10:10.content: by which will we have been sanctified through the offering of the body of Jesus Christ once for all.

히브리서 10:11.content: Every priest indeed stands day by day serving and often offering the same sacrifices which can never take away sins,

히브리서 10:12.content: but he, when he had offered one sacrifice for sins forever, sat down on the right hand of God,

히브리서 10:13.content: from that time waiting until his enemies are made the footstool of his feet.

히브리서 10:14.content: For by one offering he has perfected forever those who are being sanctified.

히브리서 10:15.content: The Holy Spirit also testifies to us, for after saying,

히브리서 10:16.content: “This is the covenant that I will make with them: ‘After those days,’ says the Lord, ‘I will put my laws on their heart, I will also write them on their mind;’ ” then he says,

히브리서 10:17.content: “I will remember their sins and their iniquities no more.”

히브리서 10:18.content: Now where remission of these is, there is no more offering for sin.

히브리서 10:19.content: Having therefore, brothers, boldness to enter into the holy place by the blood of Jesus,

히브리서 10:20.content: by the way which he dedicated for us, a new and living way, through the veil, that is to say, his flesh,

히브리서 10:21.content: and having a great priest over God’s house,

히브리서 10:22.content: let’s draw near with a true heart in fullness of faith, having our hearts sprinkled from an evil conscience, and having our body washed with pure water,

히브리서 10:23.content: let’s hold fast the confession of our hope without wavering; for he who promised is faithful.

히브리서 10:24.content: Let’s consider how to provoke one another to love and good works,

히브리서 10:25.content: not forsaking our own assembling together, as the custom of some is, but exhorting one another, and so much the more as you see the Day approaching.

히브리서 10:26.content: For if we sin willfully after we have received the knowledge of the truth, there remains no more a sacrifice for sins,

히브리서 10:27.content: but a certain fearful expectation of judgment, and a fierceness of fire which will devour the adversaries.

히브리서 10:28.content: A man who disregards Moses’ law dies without compassion on the word of two or three witnesses.

히브리서 10:29.content: How much worse punishment do you think he will be judged worthy of who has trodden under foot the Son of God, and has counted the blood of the covenant with which he was sanctified an unholy thing, and has insulted the Spirit of grace?

히브리서 10:30.content: For we know him who said, “Vengeance belongs to me;” says the Lord, “I will repay.” Again, “The Lord will judge his people.”

히브리서 10:31.content: It is a fearful thing to fall into the hands of the living God.

히브리서 10:32.content: But remember the former days, in which, after you were enlightened, you endured a great struggle with sufferings;

히브리서 10:33.content: partly, being exposed to both reproaches and oppressions; and partly, becoming partakers with those who were treated so.

히브리서 10:34.content: For you both had compassion on me in my chains, and joyfully accepted the plundering of your possessions, knowing that you have for yourselves a better possession and an enduring one in the heavens.

히브리서 10:35.content: Therefore don’t throw away your boldness, which has a great reward.

히브리서 10:36.content: For you need endurance so that, having done the will of God, you may receive the promise.

히브리서 10:37.content: “In a very little while, he who comes will come, and will not wait.

히브리서 10:38.content: But the righteous will live by faith. If he shrinks back, my soul has no pleasure in him.”

히브리서 10:39.content: But we are not of those who shrink back to destruction, but of those who have faith to the saving of the soul.
